summary: final_prepare owner fail-closed fix preserves injected Gate recheck, legacy compatibility, and HEAD suffix persistence.
judgment_delta: missing final owner now stops waiting_for_runtime and cannot call Gate preparation.
injected final owner still requires current-head Gate readiness.
legacy two-node profile and autonomous HEAD suffix rebinding remain intact.
residual_risks: Production owner connector argument compatibility remains for the production-runtime-connectors follow-up Story; this Story intentionally exposes the injection seam.
